name: Cilantro Pesto
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup parmesan cheese (or more to taste)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cilantro, parsley, parmesan, olive oil, salt, and garlic in a food processor.
2. Process until well blended, scraping down sides as needed.
3. Cover and chill for 1-48 hours to allow flavors to develop, or freeze up to 3 months.
4. Serve at room temperature.
